title: New Labour Codes have created fresh uncertainty for employers and employees: Sanjay Ghose
description: India’s new labour codes have unsettled well-developed labour jurisprudence and created fresh uncertainty for employers and employees alike, Senior Advocate Sanjoy Ghose said on Friday.Ghose said the codification exercise was a missed opportunity to consolidate decades of judicially evolved labour law principles.“Ninety percent of labour law was judge-made,” he said, noting that courts had historically shaped the law governing industrial disputes, reinstatement and worker protections.Ghose was s
